testcase.name: test_products_list_is_displayed
testcase.failure: tests\test_F_001_affichage_des_produits_electronics.py:54: in test_products_list_is_displayed assert name_text, "Nom produit vide" E AssertionError: Nom produit vide E assert ''

testcase.name: test_add_to_cart_updates_counter
